subcodes.first_line: O My Beloved, My Beloved! Unto Thee be praise and glory and exaltation; unto Thee be bounty and grace and munificence; unto Thee be all bestowals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبوبی محبوبی لک الحمد و العزه و العلی و لک الجود و الفضل و الندی و لک ایادی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @eulogies; reminiscences, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
